decks.name: Essential Chinese
decks.description: Mandarin from absolute zero, structured the way spaced-repetition research says to learn a language: the tone and pinyin system first, then day-one survival phrases, then the highest-frequency words, then the grammar patterns that snap them together. Characters ride up front with tap-to-hear speech, pinyin and usage notes appear on every reveal, and the phrases you must be able to say are trained in both directions. Simplified characters. Keep new cards to 5-10 a day and say every answer out loud.

decks.name: Essential Spanish
decks.description: Your first weeks of Spanish, front-loaded for payoff: survival phrases you can use on day one, then the highest-frequency vocabulary (numbers, time words, question words, the 25 most useful verbs, family, food, places) trained in both directions, plus the ser, estar, and tener conjugations. Latin American Spanish by default.
